example.title: Two-week landing-page refresh contractor brief
example.inputs: Deliverable: refreshed landing page (faion.net) with new hero + 4 product sections. Rate: $X fixed-price. Owner: ruslan@faion.net. Engagement length: 14 days.
example.output: { "brief_id": "GIG-23", "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "context": "Faion landing-page refresh; brand colours pinned in templates/brand.css; copy in CONTEXT.md inline.", "deliverable": "Refreshed landing-page with new hero + 4 product sections; Gatsby production build.", "acceptance_criteria": [ "Lighthouse perf >= 95 on mobile + desktop", "Visual diff against design Figma file (inlined) <= 5% deviation per section", "All copy from CONTEXT.md inlined; no Lorem Ipsum", "Zero console errors in production build" ], "evidence_checkpoints": [ {"at_day": 5, "evidence": "hero + 1 section deployed to faion-net-fe dev branch"}, {"at_day": 10, "evidence": "all sections deployed to dev, Lighthouse report shared"} ], "rate": "$X fixed-price; invoice on accept", "payment_terms": "Net-7 from accept; bank transfer; details on invoice", "escalation_owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (context inlined), r2 (4 AC), r3 (2 evidence checkpoints), r4 (named owner), r5 (rate + payment inline).
